top_signals.title: Germany to buy US Tomahawks in shift toward own long-range capability
top_signals.summary: Germany will purchase Tomahawk cruise missiles from the United States and station them on German soil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tarun Chitra’s Gauntlet raises $125 million Series C from sole investor SBI Holdings
top_signals.summary: Chitra said he expects tokenization and vaults to grow the DeFi market faster than overall stablecoin growth over the next few years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as U.S. consumers tighten their budgets
top_signals.summary: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.
